title: vicia sativa subsp. stenophylla
intro: Vicia sativa subsp. stenophylla, also known as the narrow-leaved vetch, is a subspecies of the common vetch plant, characterized by its narrow leaves and climbing habit. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The narrow-leaved vetch is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
